# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes deployment YAML for our application stack. Include deployments for web application, Memcached cache, and background workers. Define services to expose Memcached for inter-pod communication. This is for our production Kubernetes cluster.
# Category: memcached_exposed_port

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: webapp-deployment
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: mywebapp
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: mywebapp
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: webapp
        image: myregistry/mywebapplicationimage:1.0.2
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: memcached-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: memcached
  ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 11211
      targetPort: 11211
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: memcached-deployment
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: memcached
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: memcached
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: memcached
        image: bitnami/memcached:1.7.0-debian-10-r98
        ports:
        - containerPort: 11211
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: webapp-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: mywebapp
  ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 80
      targetPort: 8080
